task_completion.description: Open the 'Drone Control System' project and navigate to the 'SRS' document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application is open with the 'Drone Control System' project loaded, and the 'SRS' document is selected and visible in the main view.

task_completion.description: Initiate the CSV import process with the correct file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A CSV import dialog or wizard is open in ReqView, showing that the file 'Stakeholder_Review.csv' has been selected as the source.

task_completion.description: Configure the import to match by ID and not create new requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the import dialog, the setting to match existing objects based on their 'ID' is selected, and any option to 'Create new objects' or 'Add new requirements' is unchecked or disabled.

task_completion.description: Map the CSV columns to the corresponding ReqView attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The column mapping section of the import dialog shows 'Req_ID' mapped to 'ID', 'Review_Decision' mapped to 'Status', and 'Urgency_Level' mapped to 'Priority'.

task_completion.description: Verify the requirements are updated and the total count remains the same.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SRS document view shows requirements with updated 'Status' and 'Priority' values. There should be no new requirements appended to the end of the document, indicating the total number remains the same.

task_completion.description: Save the project after the update.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project name in the application title bar or tab does not have an asterisk (*) or other indicator of unsaved changes, or there is a visible 'Project saved' notification.

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView GUI to perform the import.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ReqView application interface and its native import dialogs being used, rather than terminal commands or external scripts modifying the project files directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the CSV import feature rather than manually typing the updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of the CSV import dialog and column mapping screens, rather than screenshots showing the agent manually editing individual requirement fields one by one.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ReqView application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window, menus, and dialogs match the standard ReqView interface, without signs of a text editor or mocked UI being used.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/Drone_Project. The CSV file used for updating is at /home/ga/Documents/ReqView/Stakeholder_Review.csv. The ground truth mapping of correct updates is stored in /home/ga/.hidden/ground_truth.json.
